title: Part 2 – Entraînement 3 : questions oui/non et invitations
instructions: Écoutez chaque question et les trois réponses. Choisissez la réponse la plus appropriée.

items.audioText: Have you received the signed contract from the client? (A) The contract is very detailed. (B) Not yet, I'll follow up this afternoon. (C) Yes, the client was satisfied.
choices: The contract is very detailed.
Not yet, I'll follow up this afternoon.
Yes, the client was satisfied.
items.explanation: Question fermée sur la réception d'un contrat. (B) répond non et annonce une action.

items.audioText: Would you like me to book a meeting room for Thursday? (A) Yes, please — for ten people. (B) The meeting lasted two hours. (C) Thursday is a public holiday.
choices: Yes, please — for ten people.
The meeting lasted two hours.
Thursday is a public holiday.
items.explanation: Offre de service ("Would you like me to..."). (A) accepte et précise le nombre de personnes.

items.audioText: Is the quarterly report ready to be sent? (A) No, I still need to add the final figures. (B) The report covers January to March. (C) I'll print it for you.
choices: No, I still need to add the final figures.
The report covers January to March.
I'll print it for you.
items.explanation: Question fermée oui/non. (A) répond non et explique ce qui manque.

items.audioText: Can you cover for me during the two o'clock briefing? (A) The briefing was cancelled. (B) Sure, I have nothing on at that time. (C) It's in the small conference room.
choices: The briefing was cancelled.
Sure, I have nothing on at that time.
It's in the small conference room.
items.explanation: Demande de remplacement. (B) accepte en confirmant sa disponibilité.

items.audioText: Did you submit your expense report for last month? (A) Yes, I sent it to accounting yesterday. (B) The expenses were quite high. (C) You need original receipts.
choices: Yes, I sent it to accounting yesterday.
The expenses were quite high.
You need original receipts.
items.explanation: Question sur une action passée. (A) confirme avec un détail (envoyé hier à la compta).

items.audioText: Would you rather meet in person or by video call? (A) The meeting went well. (B) Either works for me — whatever is easier for you. (C) I'll send you the video link.
choices: The meeting went well.
Either works for me — whatever is easier for you.
I'll send you the video link.
items.explanation: Question de préférence A ou B. (B) laisse le choix à l'interlocuteur de façon polie.

items.audioText: Has the new IT policy been communicated to the whole team? (A) The policy is very clear. (B) Not to everyone — I'll send a follow-up email. (C) IT sent an update last week.
choices: The policy is very clear.
Not to everyone — I'll send a follow-up email.
IT sent an update last week.
items.explanation: Question fermée sur la diffusion d'une politique. (B) répond non et propose une action.

items.audioText: Could you proofread this report before I send it? (A) Of course, send it over and I'll look at it now. (B) The report is fifteen pages long. (C) I read it last week.
choices: Of course, send it over and I'll look at it now.
The report is fifteen pages long.
I read it last week.
items.explanation: Demande polie de service. (A) accepte et propose une action immédiate.

items.audioText: Isn't the team lunch scheduled for Wednesday? (A) Actually, it was moved to Thursday. (B) The restaurant is downtown. (C) I'll have the pasta, thank you.
choices: Actually, it was moved to Thursday.
The restaurant is downtown.
I'll have the pasta, thank you.
items.explanation: Question de confirmation négative. (A) corrige l'information avec le bon jour.

items.audioText: Are you available to join the client call at three? (A) The client called twice. (B) I'm afraid I have another meeting then. (C) The call is about the new contract.
choices: The client called twice.
I'm afraid I have another meeting then.
The call is about the new contract.
items.explanation: Question de disponibilité. (B) répond poliment qu'il n'est pas libre à cette heure.
